input.code:
library(DESeq2)

# Load counts and metadata
counts_df <- read.csv('counts_de.csv', row.names=1)
metadata_df <- read.csv('metadata_de.csv', row.names=1)

# Convert to integer matrix (DESeq2 requirement)
counts_mat <- as.matrix(counts_df)
counts_mat <- matrix(as.integer(counts_mat), nrow=nrow(counts_mat), ncol=ncol(counts_mat),
                     dimnames=list(rownames(counts_mat), colnames(counts_mat)))

print(paste("Counts matrix:", nrow(counts_mat), "genes ×", ncol(counts_mat), "cells"))
print(paste("Metadata:", nrow(metadata_df), "cells"))
print(table(metadata_df$cell_type))

# Create DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts_mat,
                              colData = metadata_df,
                              design = ~ cell_type)

print(dds)
